2026-04-05 22:53 - Task 6np complete: Added SignalStepDone to internal/engine/signals.go. It's the lowest priority signal (after CHECKPOINT). Constant value is 10 (iota after SignalCheckpoint). All existing tests pass, new tests added for parsing and priority.
2026-04-06 14:29 - Run interrupted by user at wave 1. No task was in progress.
2026-04-06 14:32 - Task l0v complete: Created internal/wrapup/step_prompt.go with WrapupStep type (Title/Prompt/Verify fields), BuildStepPrompt (generates prompt with header, progress checklist, task, verify criteria, signal instructions), and BuildRetryPrompt (re-prompt when STEP_DONE missing). WrapupStep type is defined here since parse.go doesn't exist yet — downstream tasks creating parse.go should either import from here or move the type.
2026-04-06 14:32 - Wave 1 error on task nh9: open session: initialize: connection closed before response to initialize
2026-04-06 14:34 - Task nh9 complete: Created internal/wrapup/parse.go with ParseWrapupFile, ParseWrapupSteps (agent decomposition with JSON retry on malformed response), parseStepsJSON (extracts JSON arrays even from markdown-fenced output), LoadCachedSteps/CacheSteps (cache dir: .tick/logs/wrapup-steps/<epic-id>.json). Reused WrapupStep type from step_prompt.go (task l0v) — no duplication. 12 tests in parse_test.go all passing.
2026-04-06 14:37 - Task 451 complete: Created internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go with AgentStepResult (renamed from StepResult to avoid conflict with existing shell StepResult in wrapup.go), StepProgress, WrapupRunner types. RunAgentSteps supports SessionAgent (single session, Prompt per step) and one-shot fallback (Run per step). Retry on missing STEP_DONE up to MaxRetriesPerStep (default 2), ESCALATE marks step escalated and continues. Progress saved to .tick/logs/wrapup-progress/<epic-id>.json after each step for crash recovery. Test mocks prefixed with 'step' to avoid collision with parse_test.go mocks. 8 tests all passing.
2026-04-06 14:40 - Task 07n complete: Added Agent field to Runner, WrapupSteps to Report. Runner.Run() calls runAgentWrapupSteps() after shell steps — reads wrapup.md, uses LoadCachedSteps or ParseWrapupSteps, creates WrapupRunner, appends AgentStepResults to report. Markdown() renders wrapup steps as checklist with timing/cost/status annotations. run.go passes agentImpl to Runner. 5 new tests added (markdown rendering with/without steps, no file, empty file, cached steps execution). All 26 wrapup tests pass.
2026-04-06 14:41 - Task dhe complete: Verified .tick/.gitignore already has logs/ (covers wrapup-steps/ and wrapup-progress/). Verified wrapup.md is not gitignored. Added wrapup.md mention to tk run --help Long description. Added Wrapup Steps section to README.md between Cloud Sync and Dependency Graph sections.
